scripts.wasm:build: mkdir -p public-service/wasm/cnn && CARGO_TARGET_WASM32_UNKNOWN_UNKNOWN_LINKER=wasm-ld cargo rustc --manifest-path ../../../src/core/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release --lib --crate-type=cdylib --no-default-features && cp ../../../src/core/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/handwriting_core.wasm public-service/wasm/handwriting_core.wasm && CARGO_TARGET_WASM32_UNKNOWN_UNKNOWN_LINKER=wasm-ld cargo rustc --manifest-path ../../../src/core/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release --lib --crate-type=cdylib --no-default-features --features wasm && wasm-bindgen ../../../src/core/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/handwriting_core.wasm --target web --out-dir public-service/wasm/cnn --out-name handwriting_core_cnn
